resources.string: Powered by VOICEVOX (voicevox.hiroshiba.jp). Generated audio requires credit, e.g. “VOICEVOX:ずんだもん”. Voice model terms: see Android/data/com.saibotix.voicevoxserver/files/legal/. Extra voices: copy more .vvm files into /sdcard/voicevox/vvms/ (any file manager, survives reinstalls) and restart the server. Models are loaded on first use; the most recent two stay in RAM.
